IUpdateHandler Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The IUpdateHandler type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
CanStartUpdaterAsync
Returns a value indicating whether software updates may be manually started.
GetUpdaterStatusAsync
Returns a value indicating whether software updates are available.
